# SQL
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT
  rt.cusip,
  rt.year,
  rt.quarter,
  rt.return,
  n.ticker
FROM stocks_return AS rt
JOIN ticker_to_cusip AS n
  ON rt.cusip = n.cusip
WHERE rt.return > 3 ORDER BY return DESC
```
